vulnerability.name: CVE-2021-44228
vulnerability.description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI remote code execution vulnerability

statements.impact_statement: [original_justification:"component_not_present"] Product Alpha does not include log4j-core library. It uses logback as the logging framework.
statements.status_notes: CVSS: CRITICAL (10.0) | CWEs: CWE-20, CWE-400, CWE-502 (+1 more) | NVD: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-44228

statements.impact_statement: [original_justification:"vulnerable_code_cannot_be_controlled_by_adversary"] The vulnerable configuration parameters are hardcoded and cannot be influenced by external input or adversary control.
statements.status_notes: CVSS: MEDIUM (6.6) | CWEs: CWE-20, CWE-74 | NVD: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-44832

statements.impact_statement: [original_justification:"vulnerable_code_not_present"] Product Beta uses a custom-patched version of log4j that removes the vulnerable JNDI lookup functionality.
While log4j-core is present, the vulnerable code path is never executed due to application architecture that disables JNDI lookups at startup.
statements.status_notes: CVSS: MEDIUM (5.9) | CWEs: CWE-20, CWE-674 | NVD: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-45105

statements.impact_statement: Product Epsilon has built-in input validation and sanitization that prevents exploitation of this vulnerability. Additionally, the application runs with restricted permissions.

statements.status_notes: Critical vulnerability affecting all Product Zeta versions prior to 1.0.1. | NVD: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-00001

statements.impact_statement: Critical vulnerability affecting all Product Zeta versions prior to 1.0.1.
Fixed in version 2.3.0. Previous versions (2.0.0 - 2.2.9) were affected.

Security team is actively analyzing the potential impact on Product Theta 6.0.0. Preliminary code review suggests the vulnerable code path may not be reachable in our implementation. Dynamic testing is scheduled for completion by 2026-01-28. Customers will be notified immediately upon completion of the investigation.
statements.status_notes: Security team is actively analyzing the potential impact on Product Theta 6.0.0. Preliminary code review suggests the vulnerable code path may not be reachable in our implementation. Dynamic testing is scheduled for completion by 2026-01-28. Customers will be notified immediately upon completion of the investigation. | NVD: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-00003
